title: Union Budget 2026-27 – Is the Urban Sector Losing Priority?
description: India’s rapid urbanisation has created an urgent demand for infrastructure investment, yet recent budgetary trends reveal a paradox of rising needs but declining allocations. This paper examines the Union Budget 2026–27 in the context of twelve years of Government of […] The post Union Budget 2026-27 – Is the Urban Sector Losing Priority? appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
